stages.task: Pull activity signals: LinkedIn 'Active now' badges via Playwright, Twitter last-tweet timestamps, GitHub commit times. Build per-lead activity heatmap (24h x 7d grid).
Score each lead's active windows. Flag leads active between 8-10 AM local time as PRIME (highest reply rate window). Output ranked send schedule.
Inject ranked send times into existing cold outreach scripts. Override default send times with activity-optimized windows. Log A/B delta.
